text:
There once was an owl who loved jazz. Every evening after sunset he'd glide through oak trees searching for melodies. One day he discovered a club playing obscure jazz records. Soaring inside he found friends playing instruments he couldn't pronounce.

They danced around an antique gramophone. Each hit made them leap higher into the air. That night the owl felt alive.

Years went by. He'd grown wise but missed those nights. Suddenly one did fly forth. They'd meet at moonlit nights to hear tunes.

Now everyone knows. That owl could speak.

Together they listened to every song. And now the owl tells stories under stars.

In their dreams perhaps.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
